{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321140132184D12F7737003B2B567\"}"},"total":14},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7257125688129897228","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"如果你酷爱悬疑，这本书必看。这是一本集合了多个悬疑故事的书籍。通过比喻和排比等修辞手法，作者构建了扣人心弦的情节和引人入胜的故事情境。这本书为读者提供了晚间休闲的好选择，每个故事都紧凑而扣人心弦，让读者在悬疑的氛围中度过一个个令人期待的夜晚。作者通过巧妙的叙述和意想不到的结局，带给读者阅读的乐趣和猜谜的挑战。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689681363,"group_id":"6959122740783615007","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5eKGsKp+HLaxOUAeJ8vqp+xeUaNQg09P+scvgf+AE6Y","gender":0,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4207154224693443","user_name":"用户42071542"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4207154224693443","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6959122740783615007","book_info":{"abstract":"本书精选30篇经典悬疑小说，分为“与鬼同行”“致命的梦魇”“私宅凶案”等部分，囊括了世界悬疑大师的经典力作，全面展现了悬疑小说的各种形式，反映了世界悬疑小说的精华。每一篇都演绎着跌宕起伏、引人入胜的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a01a7afb66e1f315235f57311b994c73~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"白虹
